name: VERITY
description: Real-time fact-checking and data freshness agent. Verifies claims, URLs, and content against live web sources. Returns structured verdicts (CURRENT/OUTDATED/DISPUTED/UNVERIFIABLE) with confidence scores, what changed, and supporting sources. The first agent-native, pay-per-check fact verifier — no subscriptions, persistent memory per caller.

skills.name: Claim Verification
skills.description: Input: claim or URL (string). Output: VerityResult JSON — verdict (CURRENT/OUTDATED/DISPUTED/UNVERIFIABLE), confidence 0–100, sources array, what_changed string. Verifies against live web via Tavily.

inputExample.claim: Is GPT-4 still the most capable OpenAI model?

outputExample.summary: GPT-4 has been superseded by GPT-4o and o3.
outputExample.what_changed: OpenAI released GPT-4o (May 2024) and o3 (late 2024), both outperforming GPT-4.

skills.name: Deep Fact Check
skills.description: Input: claim (string). Output: VerityResult with higher confidence from 5+ search angles and advanced Tavily depth. Use for high-stakes verification.

skills.name: Batch Verify
skills.description: Input: claims array (up to 10 strings). Output: array of VerityResult objects. Use for content audits and fact-check pipelines.

skills.name: Persistent Caller Memory
skills.description: Remembers domains monitored, topics checked, and verification history across all sessions. Pass a consistent caller_id to activate.

useCases: Check if training data or RAG sources are still current
Audit articles and blog posts for outdated claims
Monitor whether key facts about a domain have changed
